'''''The Lucky Find''''' was a [[salvage ship]] owned by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Sreethyn]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it was operating around [[Jerijador]], and its newest crewmember was [[Kanda Farral]].

==Appearances==
